name: The Hive
ability:
After a non-fighter ship is destroyed during combat in this system, you may place 2 infantry in this system.

At the start of a ground combat in this system, you may place up to 2 infantry on that planet.

name: Broodmother
ability: When this unit becomes damaged during a ground combat, you may produce 1 infantry unit on this planet.

name: Lair I
ability: This system is a Nebula, Nebulae in or adjacent to this unit's system do not affect your ships' movement. Place a Nebula token beneath this unit as a reminder.

name: Lair II
ability: This system is a Nebula, Nebulae in or adjacent to this unit's system do not affect your ships' movement. Place a Nebula token beneath this unit as a reminder.

name: Epoch
ability: You may treat this unit as if it were adjacent to systems that contain 1 or more of your PDS. You may use this unit's Space Cannon against ships that are in adjacent systems.

name: Mantis
ability: This unit can use Anti-Fighter Barrage as if it were in space combat.

name: Orbital Defense Platform I
ability: This unit is placed in the space area of a system. No more than 1 Orbital Defense Platform I may be placed in space per system.

name: Orbital Defense Platform II
ability: This unit is placed in the space area of a system. No more than 2 Orbital Defense Platform II may be placed in space per system. You may use this unit’s SPACE CANNON against ships that are adjacent to this unit’s system.
